headlines.title: What is the Andes virus? The hantavirus linked to a cruise ship outbreak is among the deadliest strains
headlines.description: The strain of hantavirus that has killed three people and sickened five others on a cruise ship is the Andes strain, which is typically found in South America.

headlines.title: U.S. monitoring hantavirus cruise passengers; dozens left ship after 1st death
headlines.description: The United States was among a dozen countries on Thursday urgently tracking dozens of passengers who traveled on the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak

headlines.title: ‘A watershed moment’: A pancreatic cancer drug is set to transform treatment
headlines.description: An experimental pancreatic cancer drug that’s been shown to double survival in patients with advanced stages of the disease is poised to revolutionize the way the cancer is treated, oncologists say.

headlines.title: Rectal cancer deaths rising rapidly among millennials: 'It's a medical crisis'
headlines.description: Deaths from rectal cancer are rising rapidly among younger adults, an alarming trend that is confounding scientists trying to understand why millennials are so hard-hit.

headlines.title: What does it take to protect brain health? 10 habits to start now
headlines.description: Brain health is of paramount importance to nearly all Americans, yet few are aware of the latest science on how to nurture it

headlines.title: Zapp’s and Dirty Potato Chips Recalled Over Salmonella Concerns
headlines.description: Utz is recalling several types of Zapp’s and Dirty brand potato chips over concerns that the milk powder used in seasoning the chips could contain salmonella. The contaminated chips were sold in different bag sizes and flavors nationwide.

headlines.title: Contact tracing underway after passengers left ship before first reported hantavirus case
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of the hantavirus outbreak is heading toward the Canary Islands in Spain. Contact tracing is underway in multiple countries including the United States after passengers left the ship before the first reported case. NBC News' Matt Bodner reports on the latest details from the outbreak.

headlines.title: How to Identify Warning Signs From Your Body That Could Worsen
headlines.description: Dr. Cedrek McFadden, board certified surgeon, joins TODAY to break down how to listen to your body and spot signs that it’s asking for attention. He explains the difference between momentary and persistent pain, shares how to tell when memory slips becoming concerning, and more.

headlines.title: Concerns Grow Over Hantavirus Spread After Cruise Outbreak
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of the hantavirus outbreak is now heading towards the Canary Islands and sparking a global race to stop the virus from spreading further with contact tracing now underway in multiple countries. People who left the ship are being treated for the disease in Switzerland, South Africa and the Netherlands. NBC’s Raf Sanchez reports and Dr. Ashish Jha, a senior fellow at Harvard University’s Kennedy School, joins TODAY to break down what to know about the disease.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.

headlines.title: I’ve tested dozens of workout headphones: These are the best
headlines.description: I tested over a dozen workout headphones from brands like Apple, Beats, and Shokz to find our top picks for running, biking, the gym and more.

headlines.title: Expert-approved walking pads that help you sit less and move more
headlines.description: Fitness trainers share the benefits of using walking pads daily for up to 60 mins. and safety tips. Plus, shop the best expert-approved walking pads.
